plant_fiber.name: Plant Fiber
plant_fiber.description: Tough fibers useful for cordage, binding, and simple repairs.

medicinal_herb.name: Medicinal Herb
medicinal_herb.description: A useful herb. It is not directly usable until medicine actions exist.

berries.name: Berries
berries.description: A small handful of edible berries. Restores a little food and moisture.

water_skin.name: Waterskin
water_skin.description: A refillable carried water container. Each filled portion restores a small amount of hydration.

dry_wood.name: Dry Wood
dry_wood.description: Dry fuel for fire, camp, and crafting systems.

raw_meat.name: Raw Meat
raw_meat.description: Fresh raw meat. It should be cooked or preserved later.
